---
title: "Statistical Analysis of Metagenomic Data"
listing:
  contents: posts
  fields: [image, author, title, categories, description, date, file-modified]
  sort: "title"
  type: grid
  image-height: 6cm
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
